exampleSentencesTranslated: I want to get acquainted with many new friends in the English class.
She feels a bit shy when she gets acquainted with new colleagues at the company.
I usually get acquainted with my neighbors when I move to a new place.

translation.en: I want to get acquainted with you.

definitions.es: hacerse amigo o familiar de alguien o algo.
definitions.vi: trở nên quen thuộc hoặc thân thuộc với ai đó hoặc cái gì đó.
definitions.en: to become acquainted or familiar with someone or something.

example.vi: Tôi muốn làm quen với bạn mới.
example.en: I want to get to know the new friend.

notes:
làm quen = to get to know someone, to become acquainted. It’s about starting a new connection.

You use it when meeting new people, but also for getting used to something new.  
Very common pattern with với.

It can also mean “get used to” (similar to get familiar with), not just meeting people.  
Close to kết bạn (make friends), but làm quen is the first step — lighter and more general.
exampleSentences: Anh muốn làm quen với nhiều bạn mới ở lớp học tiếng Anh.
Chị thấy hơi ngại khi làm quen với đồng nghiệp mới trong công ty.
Em thường làm quen với hàng xóm khi chuyển đến nơi ở mới.

translation.en: I want to get acquainted with you.

notes_md:
**làm quen** = to get to know someone, to become acquainted. It’s about starting a new connection.

You use it when meeting new people, but also for getting used to something new.  
Very common pattern with **với**.


It can also mean “get used to” (similar to *get familiar with*), not just meeting people.  
Close to **kết bạn** (make friends), but *làm quen* is the first step — lighter and more general.
